nl_query: Show all annotations created by Dr. Anand Rao.
failed_sql:
SELECT ea_ann.id AS annotation_id, ea_ann.annotation_type, ea_ann.payload, ea_ann.created_at, au.display_name AS evaluator_name
FROM   evaluation_annotation ea_ann
JOIN   evaluation_attempt    ea ON ea.id = ea_ann.attempt_id
JOIN   app_user              au ON au.id = ea.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   faculty_cache        fc ON fc.id = au.faculty_cache_id
WHERE  fc.name = 'Dr. Anand Rao'
error: Validation failed (schema): Table or alias 'au' is referenced (e.g. in an ON clause or SELECT list) but is not declared in the FROM/JOIN clauses. Add the missing table to the FROM list, or check JOIN ordering — a JOIN's ON clause cannot reference a table that appears later in the JOIN chain.
